title: ac AI Agent
tagline: Conversational AI agent with web search, weather, file I/O, and calculator
description: A Python AI agent built on the Anthropic SDK. Runs as a command-line tool or a Flask web chat UI. The agent maintains full conversation memory across turns and uses five tools: live web search via Tavily, real-time weather via Open-Meteo, local file read/write, and a safe math evaluator. Each tool returns structured error messages so the agent never crashes or hallucinates on failures.
outcome: Functional agentic loop with structured tool use and dual CLI + web interface

title: AI Hedge Fund
tagline: 19-agent LLM system that simulates famous investors to generate stock trading signals
description: An educational multi-agent trading system built on LangGraph and LangChain. Thirteen investor-personality agents (Warren Buffett, Michael Burry, Cathie Wood, and others) each apply their real-world investment philosophy to live financial data, then six analytical agents aggregate signals into a final portfolio decision. Ships with a FastAPI backend, a React web UI with agent-graph visualization, and a point-in-time backtester.
outcome: Full-stack agentic trading simulator with 19 specialized agents, multi-LLM support, and a built-in backtester

title: Email Auto-Response Agent
tagline: Flask web app that drafts automated email replies using AI
description: A Python/Flask web application that generates automated email responses. Users paste an incoming email and the agent drafts a context-aware reply using an LLM, reducing manual response time for repetitive inbox workflows.
outcome: Web-based email agent that automates reply drafting with a serverless Flask backend

title: Chatbot Widget
tagline: Embeddable AI chat widget with a Flask backend for any website
description: A drop-in chatbot widget (chat-widget.js) backed by a Python/Flask API. The backend is primed with a business context file so the bot answers questions about a specific business. Embed with a single script tag — no framework required on the host page.
outcome: Reusable embeddable chat widget with business-context grounding and Flask API backend

title: Document Summarizer Agent
tagline: Claude-powered agent that reads and summarizes uploaded documents
description: A Flask web app that uses the Anthropic Claude Agent SDK to process and summarize documents. Users upload a file through the web interface and receive a structured summary, enabling fast triage of long reports or contracts.
outcome: Web-based document agent that delivers structured summaries via Claude's agent SDK

title: Social Media Content Generator
tagline: AI tool for generating platform-ready social media posts from a brief
description: A Python/Flask web app that takes a topic or product brief and generates ready-to-post content tailored for social media platforms. Useful for automating repetitive content creation tasks in marketing workflows.
outcome: Flask-based content agent that generates platform-ready social posts from a short brief

title: Product Description Writer
tagline: Bulk AI copywriter that generates SEO-optimised product listings from a CSV
description: A Next.js 15 app that uses the Claude API to generate SEO-optimised product titles, descriptions, feature bullets, and keywords. Supports single-product input and bulk CSV uploads (up to 100 rows) with real-time progress via Server-Sent Events. Choose from four tones — Professional, Casual, Luxury, or Budget-Friendly — and export results as CSV.
outcome: Streaming bulk product copywriter with CSV import/export, tone selection, and rate limiting

title: Job Market Snapshot
tagline: AI-powered Thai job market analyser for HR professionals and job seekers
description: A Next.js 16 app that uses the Claude API with web search to analyse the Thai job market in real time. Search by role or industry to see trending job openings, top 3–5 in-demand skills with demand metrics, salary ranges by experience level in Thai Baht, and AI-generated market insights — all streamed live and available in Thai and English.
outcome: Streaming bilingual job market analyser with Claude-powered insights, skill demand metrics, and salary data
